name: direct_mean_ms_5s
query: (sum by (imsi, ue_ip, slice, probe_role, mode) (rate(gtp_teid_latency_observed_ns_sum[5s])) / sum by (imsi, ue_ip, slice, probe_role, mode) (rate(gtp_teid_latency_observed_ns_count[5s]))) / 1000000

name: direct_p50_ms_5s
